comments.author: @abacusflinched8456
comments.text: Hiking up chelan butte after I got of work, while living there, was a horrible mistake in terms of stamina but man did getting pictures of the town at night feel like I got a glimpse of small town america from back in the day. Chelan has definitely grown up, but from 3000 feet up and at night it still looks like a tiny rural town at night.
